headline: Kyle Connor is scoring 35% above expectations
body: Kyle Connor has scored 46 goals against an expected 34.2 this season (+11.8 goals above expected). Historical data suggests deviations this large tend to normalize.
social_text: Kyle Connor is scoring at 1.35x expected (+11.8 GAx). History says this won't last.
